Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 1 0 0}{f 5 21 0 1701}Awww, there, there... You seem a little skinnier than you used to be.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 2 0 0}{f 5 21 0 1701}This little one is all I have left to keep me company...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_000_3_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 3 0 0}{f 5 21 0 1701}I was so lonely when Mii-chan was missing... I don't know how I can thank the both of you.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 7 0 0}{f 5 21 0 1701}When you get to be my age, you'll find that all the wealth in the world won't take care of you.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 9 0 0}{f 5 21 0 1701}Some of my neighbors have delightful children, but... they aren't interested in old ladies like me.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 13 0 0}It seems that living is something that can't be done alone.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 15 0 0}It's important to keep someone in your thoughts, and to know that you are in theirs.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_007_3_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 16 0 0}To be able to contact them anytime...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 20 0 0}{f 4 23 0 7 0 25 25}But I learned everything I know about living from you, {f 4 2}-san...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_009_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 22 0 0}{f 5 13 22 5 7}To live means to spend time around people...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_009_1_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 23 0 0}To keep someone in your thoughts, and know that you are in theirs... To be able to contact them anytime...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_010_1_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 27 0 0}It seems I feel happy when I'm together with you, {f 4 2}-san.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_012_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 29 0 0}If living means to be able to connect with other people...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_012_3_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 30 0 0}How close to that goal can I come with a body like mine?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_013_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 33 0 0}{f 4 23 0 7 1 25 25}I've been exceedingly negative lately. I wonder what's wrong with me...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_014_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}We decided to go back to the dorm.[n]{f 1 1}
